chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 359 of 2020 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Disposed of case 1. For orders on CMA No.2751/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.2752/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.2753/2024 (Replacing Surety) 23.05.2024 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for applicant/surety Mr. Najamuddin Dharejo, Special Prosecutor NAB >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exception. 3. By consent CMA No.2753/2024 for change of surety is allowed. Let fresh surety be submitted first on behalf of petitioner No.3 to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court at Karachi in terms of order dated 10.06.2019. And only after acceptance of fresh surety, current surety be allowed to be discharged and returned to the surety after due verification and identification as per rules. The application is disposed of accordingly Judge Judge ARBROHI
